observation.summary: Local QA added many harness and generated evidence surfaces, but meta complexity, product outcome linkage, and partial reduction debt were not measured as one loop.

hypothesis.summary: A compact maturity DSL can make harness growth, product outcome linkage, and stale partial candidates visible without changing runtime contracts.

execution.summary: Generate the maturity DSL mirror, run localproductacceptance, and publish closed-loop maturity fields into product acceptance evidence.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects generated DSL drift and CI greps for local.qa.closed_loop_maturity, meta_complexity, product_acceptance, and partial_reduction evidence.

retrospective.summary: New harnesses now have a visible maturity row; inferred product and partial metrics stay partial until promoted into runner-backed verifiers.

evidence.proves: closed-loop maturity DSL is fresh and maturity evidence is emitted
public CI preserves closed-loop maturity evidence fields
